title: Dred Dragon's
description: Mod addon for isle of berk.
body:
![dred](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7de00bf5d5e3863f71b7c943bd03c63d9fa90f.png)

Obs: deathsong is already being remade

Summary

This mod is an addon for the Isle of Berk and Archipelago additions.


It works like AA, in this first version it adds 5 new dragons, the same ones from my pack, but now with the addition of the dragon eye (Creative tab only), some lenses that work when you click them on the dragon eye.


There is also the book of dragons, it has the base dragons from the Isle of Berk, and those from my pack for now, but I intend to add all of the AA and Stego Pack, some pages are locked, and can only be accessed after using the dragon lens on the dragon's eye!



About Mod

The dragon eye has a locked and open version, to unlock it just use the Snow Wraith's tooth from the AA on it, but it is still not possible to get it in survival.

There is also an elixir, which when used on a baby dragon makes it grow instantly.

Install Requirements

Archipelago Additions (1.18.2-2.1.1)

Geckolib (1.18.2-3.0.46)

Isle of Berk (1.18.2-1.2.0)

Isle of Berk Variant Loader (1.18.2-2.4.0)

Isle of Berk Addons (1.18.2-1.1d)

[https://www.youtube.com/@Drednaww](https://www.youtube.com/@Drednaww)

Credits

Most dragon models use IoB models as a base due to hardcoded rigging dependencies making it impractical to scratch model. Archipelago Additions  does not claim to have made these models, they were created by the IoB team and now belong to NBD. We are permitted use of these IoB base assets provided we remain as an addon to IoB and/or NBD and do not claim to have made them.

SakuraBabochka for granting permission to use the dragon icons.

And the AA team who are the models used to show the dragons in the book of dragons.
